nodes.context: One of the two largest criminal organizations in Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil, focused on drug trafficking, robberies, and violent crimes.
One of the two largest criminal organizations in Rio Grande do Sul, rival of Os Manos.
Criminal group created in the 1980s from which Os Manos originated.
Another criminal faction that originated inside the Cadeia Pública de Porto Alegre.
Major Brazilian criminal organization allied with Os Manos since approximately 2017.

edges.evidence_quote: Os Manos é uma das duas maiores organizações criminosas do Rio Grande do Sul , no Brasil , ao lado dos Bala na Cara (BNC)
edges.context: Os Manos and Bala na Cara are the two largest criminal organizations in Rio Grande do Sul, presented as counterparts.

edges.evidence_quote: a organização criminosa Os Manos teve origem no interior da Cadeia Pública de Porto Alegre , a partir da Falange Gaúcha
edges.context: Os Manos originated from the Falange Gaúcha.

edges.evidence_quote: Dentro do presídio, originaram-se também os Brasas, outra facção criminosa.
edges.context: Both Os Manos and Brasas originated inside the same prison.

edges.evidence_quote: Aproximadamente desde 2017, Os Manos e o PCC têm estabelecido uma aliança
edges.context: Os Manos and PCC have established an alliance since approximately 2017.
PGC is listed as an ally of Os Manos in the infobox.
